title: Uzaki-chan Wants to Hang Out! Double
description:
Shinichi Sakurai is a quiet college student who prefers spending his free time alone and enjoying a peaceful lifestyle. However, his calm routine is constantly interrupted by Hana Uzaki, an energetic and playful underclassman who loves teasing him and forcing him into social situations. Although Shinichi often complains about her behavior, the two gradually begin spending more time together through shopping trips, games, part-time jobs, and awkward everyday adventures.

As their friendship grows closer, the people around them slowly begin noticing the romantic tension neither of them fully understands themselves. Between hilarious misunderstandings, embarrassing moments, and heartfelt interactions, Shinichi and Uzaki slowly become more important to each other than either wants to admit. Combining romance, comedy, and slice-of-life storytelling, Uzaki-chan Wants to Hang Out! Double continues the fun and chaotic relationship between two college students learning about companionship and love.
